0.text: Pleural effusion reaching 10 mm in thickness in the thickest part of the left hemithorax

1.text: Widespread crazy paving pattern in both lungs

2.text: Nodular-patchy consolidation areas with vascular enlargement in both lungs

3.text: Diffuse ground-glass opacities in both lungs consistent with alveolitis

4.text: Density increases along the peribronchial area in both lower lobe posterobasal segments
